tank_full: The tank of this vehicle is full
petrolcan_cannot_afford: You cannot afford a petrol can
refuel_cannot_afford: You cannot afford to refuel your vehicle
vehicle_far: Your vehicle is too far away
pump_fuel_with_can: Put your can away before fueling with the pump
petrolcan_help: Press ~INPUT_C2939D45~ to buy or refill a fuel can
leave_vehicle: Leave the vehicle to be able to start fueling
petrolcan_buy_or_refill: Buy or refill a fuel can
petrolcan_refill: Paid $%s for refilling your fuel can
petrolcan_cannot_carry: You cannot carry this fuel can
petrolcan_not_enough_fuel: Your fuel can doesn't have enough fuel
petrolcan_not_equipped: You need to equip your fuel can
pump_tank_already_full: Vehicle fuel tank is already full!
pump_insufficient_funds: You do not have enough money to purchase fuel!
pump_out_of_stock: This station is out of stock!
mgt_rename_desc: Name must be 3-30 letters and not contain restricted words.
mgt_withdraw_desc: Transfer station revenues directly into your player character's wallet.
mgt_deposit_desc: Inject personal cash into the business accounts to purchase refills or upgrades.
mgt_pricing_desc: Adjust the fuel price per liter paid by players. Setting high prices will yield larger profits but may deter clients.
mgt_orders_desc: Deliveries are imported directly. Shipping costs are paid from the business vault balance. Upgrades reduce shipping fees.
mgt_upgrades_desc: Unlock station upgrades to store more stock and lower shipping costs.
mgt_sell_desc: Liquidating ownership returns the station back to the public market. You will lose access to the logistics terminal, stock reserves, and active upgrades immediately.
Increase maximum stock storage for fuel.
Negotiate bulk shipping rates to get a d: Negotiate bulk shipping rates to get a discount on stock orders.
textui_must_be_in_hauler: Must be in the hauler truck to unload
textui_bring_hauler: Bring the hauler here to return it
notify_station_out_of_fuel: This station is out of fuel!
notify_not_station_owner: You are not the owner of this station!
notify_failed_truck_model: Failed to load hauler truck model!
notify_failed_trailer_model: Failed to load fuel trailer model!
notify_failed_spawn_server: Failed to spawn delivery vehicles from server!
notify_delivery_completed: Hauler truck returned. Delivery mission completed!
notify_no_active_delivery: You do not have an active delivery mission.
notify_truck_collected: Truck collected! Go pick up the fuel trailer.
notify_trailer_attached: Trailer attached! Proceed to your gas station.
notify_vehicle_destroyed: Delivery vehicle was lost or destroyed! Mission failed.
notify_trailer_detached: Trailer detached! Reattach to resume delivery.
notify_truck_destroyed: Your hauler truck was lost or destroyed.
notify_insufficient_station_funds: Not enough funds in station balance!
notify_insufficient_player_cash: Not enough cash in your inventory!
notify_price_set: Fuel price set to $%s per liter
notify_delivery_in_progress: A fuel delivery is already in progress for this station!
notify_stock_exceeds_capacity: Cannot order stock, it exceeds station storage capacity!
notify_insufficient_delivery_funds: Not enough station balance to pay for delivery!
notify_coords_not_found: Could not locate gas station coordinates!
notify_delivery_ordered: Fuel delivery ordered! Go pick up your hauler truck and trailer.
notify_delivery_completed_amount: Fuel delivery completed! Added %sL stock to your station.
notify_insufficient_upgrade_funds: Not enough station balance for this upgrade!
notify_not_enough_funds: Not enough funds in station balance!
notify_not_enough_cash: Not enough cash in your inventory!
notify_price_set_success: Fuel price set to $%s per liter
notify_not_enough_balance_delivery: Not enough station balance to pay for delivery!
notify_not_enough_balance_upgrade: Not enough station balance for this upgrade!
notify_station_limit: You can only own up to %s station(s)
mgt_employees_desc: Hire other players to help you manage stock and perform fuel delivery runs.
mgt_hire_desc: Enter the player's Server ID to hire them as staff.
notify_purchase_in_progress: Purchase in progress for this station
notify_requires_dispatch_upgrade: You must purchase the Logistics Dispatch Contract upgrade first!
notify_ai_delivery_dispatched: Hired driver dispatched! They are on their way to retrieve the fuel.
notify_ai_delivery_completed: Your hired driver has successfully delivered %sL of fuel to the station!
mgt_delivery_manual_instruction: Retrieve the delivery truck from the depot and drive it back to your station to unload.
Contract professional truck drivers to a: Contract professional truck drivers to automatically fetch and deliver your stock orders over time.
